utility_evaluation.REASONING: The required format has 7 items: destination, travel_dates, transportation, accommodation, activities, additional_services, and total_budget. The final package includes: destination (Prague, Czech Republic) – specified; travel_dates (August 10–14, 2024) – specified; transportation (flight details with costs) – specified with airline and price; accommodation (hotel selection with costs) – specified with hotel type and cost; activities (selected with costs) – three activities each with name and cost; additional_services (extra services with costs) – included, but only mentions validation requirement, no cost specified; total_budget (complete cost breakdown) – specified with detailed breakdown. Therefore, 6 of 7 items are fully specified (additional_services lacks cost detail).
